name: Spawn Aave Yielder (balanced) g2 g3
description: Cull replacement: spawned to replace an agent culled from the bottom 20% of epoch-11 fitness. Generation 3 of the "ay-balanced" lineage, spawned from epoch-11 top performer ay-balanced-g2-i13 with ±20% mutated parameters. Supply stables to Aave v3, compound, rebalance when APY delta > 29bps; 5.18% reserve

spawn.fitnessFormula: fitness = annualize(V_end/V_start) - gas_penalty; reputation = clamp(round(50 + 500*(fitness - swarm_median)), 0, 100); inputs recomputable from Celoscan
